statement: In every magma, Equation 279 (`x = ((y * x) * z) * w`) implies Equation 3405 (`x * y = z * (y * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0610
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op z y)))
